Custom Yard Signs for Outdoor Lawn & Property Advertising

Durable Corrugated Plastic Yard Signs with Professional Printing & Customization

PASTE INTO: Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Design Your Custom Yard Sign Select Size & Quantity Choose Single or Double-Sided Printing Upload Your Artwork or Use Our Designer Add Installation Stakes & Accessories PASTE INTO: Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Weather-Resistant Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Installations

Custom yard signs are a versatile promotional tool most commonly displayed in front lawns for business advertising, political promotion, real estate showings, and yard sales. Lawn signs are perfect for so many different events because they're lightweight, easy to install, and inexpensive when compared to other signage options. They're also incredibly effective at sharing a quick message with passing cars and pedestrians.

These signs are digitally printed in full color on durable 4mm white corrugated plastic material. This material has hollow flutes similar to cardboard, running horizontally on a 4' x 8' sheet. The 4mm corrugated plastic material is durable, lightweight, waterproof, and can be printed single sided or double sided, making this product ideal for outdoor advertising applications.

Here at Banners.com, we make designing, ordering, and displaying your yard sign easy with free online templates, an intuitive online designer, and real-time tracking for your order. You can also add wire installation stakes to accommodate your single or double-sided yard sign for secure property display.

Note: All coroplast yard signs are cut 1/8th of an inch on each side for finishing. A 18" x 24" yard sign will measure 17.75" x 23.75" when shipped. If precise dimensions are required, please contact our customer service team to discuss your specific application.

PASTE INTO: Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== MATERIAL OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Weather-Resistant Yard Sign Material for Outdoor Installations

Our custom yard signs are printed on premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material, specifically designed for outdoor durability and professional appearance.

Material Specifications

  • Thickness: 4mm corrugated plastic with hollow flutes for lightweight strength
  • Weather Resistance: Waterproof and UV-resistant for long-term outdoor display
  • Print Surface: Smooth white surface optimized for vibrant full-color printing
  • Durability: Resistant to cracking, fading, and weather damage
  • Weight: Lightweight construction for easy installation and handling

Flute Direction

The corrugated flutes run horizontally on standard 4' x 8' sheets (96" direction), providing optimal strength for yard sign applications and proper drainage of moisture.

This material choice ensures your yard signs maintain their professional appearance and structural integrity throughout extended outdoor display periods, making them ideal for real estate, political campaigns, business promotion, and event advertising.

PASTE INTO: Material Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FINISHING OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Finishing & Installation Options for Property Display

Print Finishing Options

  • Margin Options: 1/2" white margin or full bleed printing (ink to edge)
  • Printing Sides: Single-sided or double-sided printing available
  • Color: Full-color digital printing for vibrant, professional results

Installation Accessories

Professional installation accessories available to secure your yard signs:

  • H Stakes: Available for 10x15, 10x24, or 10x30 yard signs
  • Beefy Stakes: Heavy-duty option for challenging ground conditions
  • Zip Ties: 12-inch black or 36-inch white for additional mounting options

Large Format Scoring

Signs over 32" x 48" (or total dimensions exceeding 81") are automatically scored and folded for shipping efficiency. We cut through the top layer without penetrating the entire sign, then fold for optimal packaging.

If you require oversized signs without scoring, please contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300 or visit our oversized flat shipping options.

PASTE INTO: Finishing Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Custom Yard Sign Production & Turnaround Times

We provide flexible production time ranges to meet your project timeline needs, with options from one to five business days.

1 Business Day Priority

Fast-track production for tight deadlines. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes may be available - contact customer service for availability.

2 Business Day Express

Ideal balance of speed and planning time. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day. Emergency same-day rushes may be available upon request.

3 Business Day Standard

Our most popular production option, offering reliable turnaround for most custom yard sign projects. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST will be processed the following business day.

5 Business Day Saver

Cost-effective option for projects with flexible timelines, allowing maximum planning time for your yard sign installation.

Production Timeline Notes

  • Total delivery time includes both production and shipping time
  • Turnaround begins when file upload is complete
  • Orders requiring prepress review or proof approval start timing from approval confirmation
  • Contact customer service at 320-391-5300 for emergency rush availability
PASTE INTO: Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PAYMENT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Payment & Ordering Options

Secure Payment Methods

We accept all major payment methods for your custom yard sign order, with secure processing and immediate order confirmation.

Bulk Pricing Available

Volume discounts are available for large yard sign orders, making them cost-effective for political campaigns, real estate agencies, and business promotions.

Custom Quote Service

For specialized yard sign projects, complex designs, or unique size requirements, our team can provide detailed custom quotes to meet your specific needs and budget.

Order Verification

Order proofs are available upon request, providing a low-resolution preview of your artwork along with complete order details including pricing, billing, and shipping information before production begins.

Account Options

  • Guest checkout available for quick orders
  • Create account for order tracking and reorder convenience
  • Business accounts available for frequent yard sign orders

Questions about payment options or need assistance with your order? Contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300 for personalized support.

PASTE INTO: Payment Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING GUIDELINES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Options for Custom Yard Sign Delivery

Standard Shipping Guidelines

Yard signs are carefully packaged and shipped to ensure they arrive in perfect condition for immediate installation.

Shipping Methods Available

  • Ground Shipping: Standard delivery for most yard sign orders
  • Express Options: Available for time-sensitive political campaigns and events
  • Oversized Shipping: Special handling for large format yard signs

Packaging & Protection

Signs over 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for efficient shipping while maintaining structural integrity. Smaller signs ship flat in protective packaging.

Delivery Tracking

Real-time tracking information is provided for all yard sign shipments, allowing you to plan your installation timeline accordingly.

Shipping Maps & Coverage

We ship custom yard signs nationwide with detailed shipping maps available to estimate delivery times to your location.

Special Shipping Considerations

  • Oversized signs requiring flat shipping available upon request
  • Installation accessories ship with signs when ordered together
  • Weather-protected packaging ensures signs arrive ready for outdoor display

Need specific delivery arrangements or have questions about shipping to your location? Contact our team at 320-391-5300.

PASTE INTO: Shipping Guidelines Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== COMMON USES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Outdoor Lawn & Property Uses for Custom Yard Signs

Real Estate Applications

Professional yard signs for property listings, open houses, and real estate agent branding. Weather-resistant materials ensure consistent visibility throughout listing periods.

Political Campaign Signage

Effective candidate promotion and issue advocacy signs designed for high-visibility placement in residential areas, with options for bulk orders and rapid production timelines.

Business Advertising & Promotion

Drive traffic to your business with eye-catching yard signs promoting sales, new locations, services, or special events. Ideal for storefront properties and high-traffic residential areas.

Event & Yard Sale Announcements

Clear, professional signage for garage sales, estate sales, fundraising events, and community gatherings. Lightweight design allows for easy placement and repositioning.

Construction & Development Projects

Project announcements, safety notices, and developer branding for construction sites and new developments. Durable materials withstand job site conditions.

Educational & Community Uses

  • School event promotion and fundraising
  • Community organization announcements
  • Graduation celebrations and achievements
  • Nonprofit awareness campaigns
  • Municipal and government notices

Installation Versatility

Compatible with various installation methods including H-stakes for lawn placement, zip-tie mounting to fences, and temporary adhesive applications for hard surfaces.

PASTE INTO: Common Uses Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Yard Sign Artwork Requirements for Professional Printing

Optimal File Formats

For the highest print quality, we recommend:

  • Preferred: .eps files converted to outlines
  • Also Accepted: High-resolution .pdf or .jpg files
  • Resolution: Minimum 300 DPI for crisp, professional results

Design Specifications

  • Color Mode: CMYK for accurate color reproduction
  • Bleed: Include 1/8" bleed for full-bleed designs
  • Safe Zone: Keep important text and graphics 1/4" from edges
  • Text Size: Minimum 12pt for optimal readability from viewing distance

Color Matching Services

For color-critical projects, our Color Match Proof System ensures precise color reproduction. This service is recommended for brand-specific colors or exact color requirements.

Design Assistance Available

Our professional graphic design team can help optimize your artwork for yard sign printing. If you're unsure about your file quality or need design modifications, we're here to assist.

Proof Options

  • Order Proofs: Low-resolution preview with complete order summary
  • Color Match Proofs: Physical color samples for critical color matching
  • Digital Proofs: Email preview for quick approval

File Upload Process

Upload artwork directly through our online system with real-time file verification. Production timeline begins once your artwork upload is complete and approved.

Questions about artwork preparation? Contact our design team at 320-391-5300 for professional assistance.

PASTE INTO: Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

PASTE INTO: Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Frequently Asked Questions About Custom Yard Signs

What are yard signs and how are they used?

Yard signs are lightweight, weather-resistant corrugated plastic signs designed for outdoor display on lawns, properties, and public spaces. They're commonly used for real estate listings, political campaigns, business advertising, event promotion, and community announcements. Their durability and easy installation make them ideal for temporary and semi-permanent outdoor messaging.

What material are your custom yard signs printed on?

Our yard signs are printed on premium 4mm white corrugated plastic (coroplast) material. This waterproof, UV-resistant material features hollow flutes for lightweight strength and is specifically designed for outdoor durability. The smooth white surface provides excellent print quality for vibrant full-color graphics and text.

What are the most common yard sign sizes available?

Popular yard sign sizes include 12" x 18", 18" x 24", and 24" x 36" for standard residential and commercial use. We also offer custom sizing for specific applications. Signs larger than 32" x 48" are automatically scored and folded for shipping, while smaller sizes ship flat.

Can my yard signs be printed with double-sided graphics?

Yes, we offer both single-sided and double-sided printing for all yard sign sizes. Double-sided printing is ideal when your sign will be viewed from multiple directions, such as on corner properties or in high-traffic areas where visibility from both sides increases your message impact.

Do you offer bulk pricing for large yard sign orders?

Yes, volume discounts are available for bulk yard sign orders. This makes large orders cost-effective for political campaigns, real estate agencies, business chains, and community organizations. Contact our customer service team at 320-391-5300 for specific bulk pricing information.

What production times do you offer for yard signs?

We offer flexible production times ranging from 1 to 5 business days: 1-day Priority for urgent needs, 2-day Express for quick turnaround, 3-day Standard (most popular), and 5-day Saver for cost-effective orders. Turnaround begins when artwork upload is complete and approved.

Do yard signs include installation stakes?

Installation stakes are available as add-on accessories during ordering. We offer H-stakes for various sign sizes (10x15, 10x24, 10x30), heavy-duty Beefy stakes for challenging ground conditions, and zip ties for fence mounting. Stakes are ordered separately to accommodate different installation needs.

Can I display yard signs without ground stakes?

Yes, yard signs can be mounted using various methods beyond ground stakes. Options include zip-tie attachment to fences, adhesive mounting to smooth surfaces, insertion into existing sign frames, or leaning against structures. The lightweight corrugated material is versatile for multiple display methods.

Are yard signs weather-resistant for long-term outdoor use?

Yes, our 4mm corrugated plastic material is waterproof and UV-resistant, designed to withstand outdoor weather conditions including rain, sun exposure, and moderate wind. For optimal longevity, store signs indoors during extreme weather and clean with mild soap and water when needed. Proper care extends their usable life significantly.

PASTE INTO: FAQ Tab --------------------------------------------------
